Class SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.CalibrationSummary

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.separator.entrainment.SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.CalibrationSummary
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.BatchCalibrationSummary
Enclosing class:
SeparatorPerformanceCalculator
public static class SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.CalibrationSummary extends Object implements Serializable
Result object for one-point calibration of entrainment factors.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim team
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • CalibrationSummary

      public CalibrationSummary(double prevLig, double prevGcu, double prevLiqLiq, double newLig, double newGcu, double newLiqLiq, int ligPoints, int gcuPoints, int liqLiqPoints)
      Constructs a calibration summary.
      Parameters:
      prevLig - previous liquid-in-gas factor
      prevGcu - previous gas carry-under factor
      prevLiqLiq - previous liquid-liquid factor
      newLig - new liquid-in-gas factor
      newGcu - new gas carry-under factor
      newLiqLiq - new liquid-liquid factor
      ligPoints - number of liquid-in-gas points used
      gcuPoints - number of gas carry-under points used
      liqLiqPoints - number of liquid-liquid points used
